ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_charts" (
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size chart */,
  "apparel_type" TEXT /* Type of apparel (e.g., shirts, pants) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size chart */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size chart was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size chart was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated size chart */,
  "bust" TEXT /* Bust measurement */,
  "waist" TEXT /* Waist measurement */,
  "hip" TEXT /* Hip measurement */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height measurement */,
  "sleeve_length" TEXT /* Sleeve length measurement */,
  "inseam" TEXT /* Inseam measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the measurement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the measurement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_standards" (
  "standard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size standard */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region for the size standard (e.g., USA, UK) */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Size label for the standard (e.g., XXS, XS) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size standard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size standard was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the size standard was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standard_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_conversions" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size measurements */,
  "size_standard_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size standard */,
  "size_value" TEXT /* Value of size in the respective standard */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the conversion was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the conversion was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_size_standard_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_standard_id") REFERENCES size_standards ("standard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_conversions_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES size_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the customer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_sizes" (
  "customer_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer size entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart */,
  "preferred_size" TEXT /* Preferred size for the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the customer size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the customer size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_sizes_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_sizes_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart the product follows */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_sizes" (
  "product_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product size entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size measurement */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Available stock quantity for this size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the product size was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES size_measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_sizes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who returned the product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product being returned */,
  "return_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date of the return */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the return was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the return was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total sales for this size */,
  "total_returns" INTEGER /* Total returns for this size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analytics data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analytics data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend entry */,
  "size_chart_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the size chart */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the trend observation */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the trend (e.g., sales, returns) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trend data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the trend data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_trends_size_chart_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_chart_id") REFERENCES size_charts ("size_chart_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "recommended_size" TEXT /* Recommended size for the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the recommendation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the recommendation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the product (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
